message:
fix(tui): Fix duplicate PRESSURE_ID and add AA view mode support to pressure overlay

App.tsx:
- Remove duplicate PRESSURE_ID constant declaration
- Keep single definition with other overlay IDs for consistency

PackagingPressureOverlay.tsx:
- Add viewMode state subscription from store
- Convert scroll position to base pairs when in AA view mode
  - AA mode: scroll represents amino acids, multiply by 3 for bp
  - DNA mode: scroll already in base pairs
- Clamp converted position to genome length bounds
- Use clampedBp for all calculations (fill, force, pressure, ATP)

This fix ensures the pressure overlay displays correct values regardless
of whether the user is viewing DNA (nucleotide) or AA (amino acid) mode.
Previously, AA mode would show ~1/3 the expected fill fraction since
scroll position wasn't converted from codon units to base pair units.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
